models.code:
class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customer'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    balance = Column(Decimal, default=0)
    credit_limit = Column(Decimal, default=1000)
models.description: Model representing a customer with basic details and financial attributes.
models.name: Customer

models.code:
class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customer.id'), nullable=False)
    date_shipped = Column(DateTime)
    notes = Column(String)
    amount_total = Column(Decimal, default=0)
models.description: Model for handling customer orders, including notes and shipment details.
models.name: Order

models.code:
class Item(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'item'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('order.id'), nullable=False)
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('product.id'), nullable=False)
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False, default=1)
    unit_price = Column(Decimal, nullable=False)
    amount = Column(Decimal, default=0)
models.description: Model for order items, linked to orders and products, with pricing details.
models.name: Item

models.code:
class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'product'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    unit_price = Column(Decimal, nullable=False)
models.description: Model representing a product with pricing details.
models.name: Product

rules.name: CustomerBalanceCreditLimitConstraint
rules.description: Customer balance should not exceed credit limit.
rules.code:
Rule.constraint(validate=Customer,
                as_condition=lambda row: row.balance <= row.credit_limit,
                error_msg="Customer balance ({row.balance}) exceeds credit limit ({row.credit_limit})")

rules.name: CustomerBalanceCalculation
rules.description: Customer's balance is calculated as the sum of Orders' amounts where not shipped.
rules.code: Rule.sum(derive=Customer.balance, as_sum_of=Order.amount_total, where=lambda row: row.date_shipped is None)

rules.name: OrderAmountTotalCalculation
rules.description: Order's total amount is calculated as the sum of its items' amounts.

rules.name: ItemAmountCalculation
rules.description: Item amount is calculated as quantity multiplied by unit price.

rules.name: ItemUnitPriceCopy
rules.description: Item unit price is a copy of Product unit price.

rules.name: OrderKafkaShippingEvent
rules.description: Send Order to 'order_shipping' topic on Kafka if it's shipped.
rules.code:
Rule.after_flush_row_event(on_class=Order, calling=kafka_producer.send_row_to_kafka,
                       if_condition=lambda row: row.date_shipped is not None,
                       with_args={"topic": "order_shipping"})
